text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway, and<n>Tamamo
Cross stops me as I'm<n>about to walk by her.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you. If ya happen to spot Oguri<n>havin' some
trouble, would ya mind<n>lendin' her a hand?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We're preparing for the haunted<n>house we
talked about before. You<n>know, the mummy
hunt?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We're the mummies, and Oguri's the<n>hunter.
That makes us enemies, so<n>we can't exactly
help her out.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If the opposin' teams get too<n>chummy, there's
gonna be no tension.<n>That's why we're taking
steps to<n>make sure that doesn't happen. So<n>
thanks in advance!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I guess the elementary school<n>won't have
a stairwell in this spot. So,<n>if I want to leave the
building, then...
choice_data_list: Are you lost, by any chance?
Are you lost, by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I was practicing for the haunted<n>house by
imagining this is the<n>elementary school we're
gonna be in<n>for the actual event. But then I got<n>
confused...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Gruhhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey, Inari. I'm lost... Which way's the<n>exit?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whaddya askin' me for?! We'reenemies, remember?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just ask that trainer over there.<n>You're
supposed to be brawlin' with<n>us mummies.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I asked because I know I can rely on<n>all of you...
And by the way,<n>three-on-one isn't really fair.
Let's go<n>two-on-two instead.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Yer killin' me over here. All<n>right, how
'bout this? If you can beat<n>all us mummies right
now, we'll go<n>two-on-two.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
In order to win, you either gotta use<n>that toy gun
to wipe out all us<n>mummies, or get all the way to
the<n>Three Goddesses statue safely.<n>Whaddya
say?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...So I just have to win?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho, makin' it sound easy. Y'know<n>I'm just
gonna camp at the goal and<n>ambush ya, right?
Which means it's a<n>race to the Three
Goddesses statue.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And if we're racin', ya got no chance<n>against
me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: If we're racing... I'm gonna be the<n>winner!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri, that's the wrong way! It'sthis way!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Bang! ...Gotcha. That's Creekdown!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, not half bad! Looks like she's<n>finally
takin' this seriously!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! There's nothin' like a race<n>to light a
fire under Oguri's butt!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Get back here!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm feelin' it! This pressure! Oguri's<n>gettin'
closer! But first place is—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: HAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: MINE!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You lose, Oguri! Team Mummy for the<n>win! Total
victory!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It looked like you were focusin' real<n>hard on
Tama, so I was able to tag<n>you on the back too!
Faster than<n>runnin' to the statue, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya got beat to the statue and yagot tagged... It's a shutout, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna lose again! I'll think of<n>a way to
beat you guys and win for<n>sure!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit. The hunter's<n>supposed to guide
the guests and<n>help 'em out, not us.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You did wonderfully, Oguri. Atta<n>girl! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Eyyy, Creek! Until we're done<n>practicin', yer
forbidden from coddlin'<n>anyone!
